open_findings: IMPORTANT (unfixed): a REVISE adjudication recorded behind a FILE-adjudicated LATER round silently reverses converged=yes and re-enters the reporting deadlock #603 exists to remove. The write-once out-of-order guard is one-directional; the AC21 supersession sweep runs only at FILE-adjudication time so a ledger written afterwards is never superseded. Reproduced end-to-end against HEAD by the final-pass reviewer. Fix: refuse a REVISE adjudication for round N when any completed round later than N is already FILE-adjudicated (breadcrumb adjudication-out-of-order), plus a mirror row beside _row4b.

TEST GAP: query-findings is never asserted to emit status=invalidated or status=superseded, though the skill's reconciliation discipline branches on exactly those.
